confirmed.note: generic-lambda arg-type collection loop (visit args -> lookup symbol -> deduceLambdaClosureType) duplicated; second copy extended with recursive-lambda auto&& branch
second fn is copy of first: identical operand-inference prologue + identical guard block; comment literally says 'Same guards as tryAnnotateBinaryOperandConversions'
anonymous union/struct member parse+flatten loop copied as 'original code path' alongside new token-API path; ~100 lines verbatim incl nested-union recursion
NonTypeValueIdentity::MemberPointer substitution branch duplicated; only diff is flag set (substituted_template_param_ref vs substituted_identifier)

false_positives.what_happened: Two Itanium C++ ABI type-code switch ladders (case TypeCategory::Int: output += 'i'; etc.). The mapping TypeCategory->mangling-char is fixed by the Itanium ABI spec, so the same switch legitimately recurs in different mangling functions. Token/line detector sees a long verbatim run of high-entropy lines and flags it.
false_positives.fix_proposal: #056: treat a run that is dominated by a switch/case-with-single-statement-and-break pattern as a 'dispatch table' and down-weight (same family as the existing data-table filter). Concretely: if >=70% of the matched lines match /^\s*case .+:.*;\s*break;/ or are bare 'case X:' fallthroughs, drop the candidate. This is a spec-mandated lookup, not logic copy.

false_positives.where: src/Parser_Templates_Inst_ClassTemplate.cpp (entire file, +5875/-0) and ~30 other new src files
false_positives.what_happened: Commit #800 'Split files as per recommendations' carves a monolith (Parser.cpp / AstNodeTypes.h) into many new files. Bodies move verbatim, so cross-file detector reports the new files as near-duplicates of the (deleted) originals. Pure relocation, not authored duplication.
false_positives.fix_proposal: #056 --diff: when a hunk is pure-addition in file B AND a near-identical pure-deletion exists in file A within the SAME commit, classify as a move (rename/relocation) and suppress, exactly like the rename-detection already added in 0beb2f7 but extended to many->one and one->many splits (match on moved-block content, not whole-file path).

false_positives.where: src/IRConverter_ConvertMain.cpp +10502/-10495 and every tracked src file
false_positives.what_happened: Commit #1029 'Apply clang-format across tracked sources' rewrites nearly every line (whitespace/brace reflow). Diff is ~100% churn but semantically a no-op; any block-diff vs base looks like massive edited-copy.
false_positives.fix_proposal: #056/archcheck: add a whitespace-insensitive pre-normalization for the --diff path (strip leading/trailing ws, collapse runs) before hashing windows; a commit whose every changed file normalizes to ~identical content (format-only) should be flagged format-only and excluded from copy scoring.

cycle.desc: AstNodeTypes.h -> AstNodeTypes_Template.h -> TemplateEnvironment.h -> TemplateRegistry_Types.h -> TemplateTypes.h -> AstNodeTypes.h (also TemplateTypes.h -> TemplateExpressionEquivalence.h -> AstNodeTypes.h)

intro_commits.reason: #800 monolith split (Feb 2026): splitting AstNodeTypes/TemplateRegistry into Types subheaders created mutual TypeIndex dependency between the new pieces

intro_commits.edge: AstNodeTypes_Template.h adds #include "TemplateEnvironment.h" (placed mid-file at line 374, after the StorageClass enum)
intro_commits.reason: #1473 8-phase template-binding refactor (May 2026): back-edge include forced into the middle of the header to give VariableDeclarationNode access to TemplateEnvironment, closing the cycle
#1480 (May 2026): unified InstantiationContext bindings needed registry key types, pulling registry into the environment header
#1530 (May 2026): dependent-NTTP expression-identity fix needed the equivalence helper inside TemplateTypes, adding a second closing path through the SCC

cycle.evidence: All 8 members under src/ are author code (FlashCpp's own AST/template subsystem): AstNodeTypes.h, AstNodeTypes_Expr.h, AstNodeTypes_Stmt.h, AstNodeTypes_Template.h, TemplateEnvironment.h, TemplateTypes.h, TemplateRegistry_Types.h, TemplateExpressionEquivalence.h. No vendor dir. SCC grew gradually across 4 commits Feb->May 2026 (monolith split seeded it, three later refactors added back-edges). 3 other smaller author-code SCCs also present (4: AstNodeTypes_Core/TypeSystem/StringLiteralTokenUtils/Lexer; 3: TemplateRegistry trio; 2: AstToIr/IrGenerator).
